title: 40 Pack Glass Favor Jars with Cork Lid, 3.4 oz Small Glass Bottles for Wedding Favor, Baby Shower, Party Favor, Gift Jars for Candy, Bonus Twine and Labels
description:
About this item
Durable: The glass jars with cork lids are made of premium material,3mm thick glass allows the glass spice jars to last for years. Even if you decorate the cute jars in an exaggerated way, it’ll look like new jar after every time you wash it.
Specification:The glass jars with lids measurement approx 2.21”Diameter x 2.77”Height,1.54”Opening. 3.4oz mini mason jars are great to store as jam jars, spice, pebble, potion bottles, candle jars and so on.
Accessories: Extra 2 bundles of string and 40 labels for convenient perfect presentation & personalization. Use your imagination to decorate them as wonderful wedding favors or baby shower favors for guests.
Great Gift Jars: The small jars with lids look very aesthetic and cute, perfect for party favors, wedding favors, shower favors, filled with mousse and small desserts. Nice small jars for chocolate candies.
Notes: Please soak the jelly jars in warm water first if you need to pour boiling water or hot liquid inside, especially use the small mason jars as candle containers.
› See more product details
reviews_5s:
Super cute! Using these jars for various things around our home and they work very well. Compact size, thick glass and the corks hold good enough so long as you are not shaking it vigorously upside down.Filled with candies as favors to give out. Bigger than expected. I fit a good amount of candy in them. Thick glass. The corks stay in. They looked really nice.I purchased similar ones but square also 3.4 oz. I preferred squared again but for the price I opted to get these. Either the square ones were larger than 3.4 ounces or these are smaller. I did a measuring test and the square ones are just larger than advertised. I preferred squared and liked that they’re bigger since I’m using for spices but keeping bc they’re a great price and still cute.These are nice cute about 3 oz jars.
I use them for candle making works well .
Sturdy and great qualityI used these to hold candies for party favors for an anniversary party. They are small, but perfect for small candies like M&M's. I put them in cellophane bags, tied them with string, and added a tag. They were well packed and arrived in perfect condition!These were just as they were described. Great shipment, nothing broken.These are so perfect to make a bunch of candles for gifts. Great value for your moneyI am using these for a baby shower favor filled with Hershey’s kissesWe use this product for a baby showerPerfect for my project 👌
reviews_1s:
The jar with cork was cute. It came with flimsy rope and NO tags. I’m very disappointed with this orderI have purchased there 3x now (my 3rd box is in the mail). The first box was PERFECT. The jars are sturdy and the cork fit amazingly well. I was having an issue with the corks in the second box and just now compared the two corks And the corks from the first batch are so much better. Please bring back the longer corks. The short corks DONT FIT!
I’ll be returning this next box if the corks aren’t the right lengthOne of the jars was missing the bottom of the jar. I looked everywhere for the broken piece and it wasn’t in the box. It was packaged all broken!I bought these to fill with a bath salt mix and sell at markets but the lids do not stay on the many of the of the jars. I lost probably more than 35% of my product.20 out of 40 covers or corks were missing from the 40 jars, unhappy with the shipmentI bought these because I loved the 7 oz version by the same company. I am using the larger ones as Spice jars, but I wanted some smaller ones. When I opened the Pkg. I was delighted, they would be 5 stars, they are cute and would be perfect IF ONLY THE CORKS FIT the jars.This item was not good The cork covers did not fit the bottles. Never ordering that again
The item is called Ritayedet 40 bottlesThe kids on these do not actually fit at all. These are useless unless you will be using on something you can glue lid shut for! Highly disappointed in these jars.They did not seal. Lids didn’t fit or stay on properly. Wish I had returned them.Broke while lit
